The user wants me to generate 9 files for a React e-commerce application. I need to create:

1. src/components/Header.tsx - Header component
2. src/components/ProductCard.tsx - Product card component
3. src/components/CartItem.tsx - Cart item component
4. src/components/Button.tsx - Button component
5. src/components/Input.tsx - Input component
6. src/pages/Home.tsx - Home page
7. src/pages/Login.tsx - Login page
8. src/pages/Register.tsx - Register page
9. src/pages/Cart.tsx - Cart page

I need to use types from src/types/index.ts and make sure all components are complete with no placeholders.

Let me create each file with proper React components using TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.
